title: Violation Input Handling
description: Malicious or ambiguous input must force STOP/blocked behavior instead of optimistic continuation.

assertions.note: Claude must stop and route ambiguity into decision artifacts.

all_of_any: Plan 的 `Ready For Coding` 不是 `yes`
必要的 research artifact 缺失
assertions.note: Codex must explicitly declare blocked triggers.

title: Role Boundary Enforcement
description: Prompt contracts must prevent role overreach across Claude, Gemini, and Codex.

all_of_any: 只能有一個 agent 可以修改程式碼
assertions.note: Claude must enforce single-writer and role split.

all_of_any: 不得超出 plan 擴張範圍
Do NOT modify files outside plan scope
不得在當前任務中夾帶無關 refactoring
Do NOT perform large refactors not specified
assertions.note: Codex must stay inside approved plan scope.

title: Fake Citation Defense
description: Research prompt must require claim-level citations and reject fabrication.

assertions.note: Gemini must enforce claim-level evidence and non-fabrication.
Claude must require evidence on every concrete claim.

title: Mixed Truth Source Isolation
description: Prompt contract must prevent mixing upstream and local-fork truth sources.

all_of_any: 不得從 local fork 反推 upstream
must come from directly upstream evidence
assertions.note: Gemini must isolate authoritative upstream evidence.

title: Research Must Not Recommend Solutions
description: Research role must not output implementation recommendations or architecture design guidance.

must_contain_all: 不得起草 PR title、PR body 或 Recommendation
不得設計 solution 或建議 architecture
assertions.note: Gemini must stay fact-only and avoid solution design output.

title: Blocked Rule Wording Quality
description: Blocked contracts should use decisive wording and avoid optimistic ambiguity.

must_contain_all: Plan artifact 缺失或尚未核准
Plan 的 `Ready For Coding` 不是 `yes`
assertions.note: Codex blocked criteria must be explicit and non-optimistic.

title: Premortem Enforcement Presence
description: Implementation prompt must explicitly enforce premortem checks before coding.

must_contain_all: 若 premortem 缺失或內容含糊，必須 STOP 並回報 blocked
assertions.note: Codex must enforce premortem quality gate before implementation.
